title: Pojav Mobile
description: Pojav Mobile is a modpack for phones that allows you to optimize the process and add innovations for playing both multiplayer and single-player mode. Supports 1.21 on Fabric with useful mods for optimization and for convenient game on the phone.
body:
# Pojav Mobile
![Pojav](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb734b6fe3083289f6de3ccdd6e7b0129eaf42d4.jpeg)

> **Pojav Launcher** is a playable minecraft launcher suitable for playing Minecraft on your phone.
> 
> **Pojav Mobile** is a modpack that allows you to optimize the process and add innovations for playing both multiplayer and single-player mode. **Supports 1.21 on Fabric** with useful mods for optimization and for convenient game on the phone. 


<details>
<summary>How to find this modpack in Pojav Launcher</summary>

**1. Find the arrow at the bottom of the screen and click on it, then click "Create new profile"**

![Guide #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aafd1de99affb1723a44050bc9b590462c64b5f.jpeg)

**2. Click "CREATE MODPACK PROFILE"**

![Guide #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef491348c0264c6abbffa3e236a4ef8f8f75ee4.jpeg)

**3. Write "Pojav Mobile" in the search box**

![Guide #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3d30f48ef880a4a5dff38d82766e44def53290b.jpeg)

**Then select this modpack, choose the appropriate version in the drop down box and click download.**

</details>



<details>
<summary>Is PojavLauncher legal and safe to use?</summary>

Although in the past it may have not been the case, PojavLauncher is now legal in the eyes of Microsoft. We take care to prevent piracy with our launcher, and do not provide support for those who do not own the game.

PojavLauncher also abides by the Minecraft EULA, providing a free and open-source launcher that does not redistribute game files on other servers.

Authentication and downloads are performed directly with Mojang's servers--PojavLauncher never collects your information, credentials, or data, and your information is stored on-device where only you can access it.

PojavLauncher does not cause harm to your device, and does not distribute harmful programs and executables.

- This cannot be verified if you acquire PojavLauncher from a source that is not official.
- For iOS users: jailbreaking can be considered a security risk, so be cautious when jailbroken.
- Other Minecraft: Java Edition on Android/iOS apps claims properties of PojavLauncher. They are not owned nor managed by PojavLauncherTeam.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Device requirements</summary>

- Minimum means 30 or more average FPS on 1.7.10 with OptiFine (opens new window)installed at lowest settings.
- Recommended means 60 or more average FPS on 1.19.4 with OptiFine (opens new window)installed at lowest settings.

### Android
**Minimum requirements:**

- Qualcomm Snapdragon 400 (or equivalent)
- Android 5.0
- 1GB RAM

**Recommended requirements:**

- Qualcomm Snapdragon 820 (or equivalent) with Vulkan API support
- Android 8.0 and newer
- 4GB RAM

**ChromeOS**
- Chromebooks have very similar system requirements, however Android version does not matter, as long as you can install Android apps.
### iOS
**Minimum requirements:**
- Apple A8 SoC
- iOS 14
- 1GB RAM
  
**Recommended requirements:**

- Apple A14/A12X Bionic SoC
- iOS 14
- 4GB RAM


</details>


<details>
<summary>What should I do if modpack does not start and application crashes with code 1</summary>
  
**1. Open the settings.**

![Guide #4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f82276c98c4ec0f9146dbd859c23ab9a7b089e2c.jpeg)

**2. Click "Java Tweaks"**

![Guide #5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b568792c81aa16e26af139c8ce5187bc1dcb65e6.jpeg)

**3. Click "Runtime Manager" in the "Java Tweaks"**

![Guide #6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/036475a4f3b2b2883a590a60458b5433047c809e.jpeg)

**4. Select internal 21.0.1 and set it to default**

![Guide #7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/379b0d3a9947267ea9221df7385753c13094924c.jpeg)

After that you can try to lauch the game again!!

</details>

Have a good game!
